payload.description: Implement the Phase 0 project skeleton: VERSION file, Python package (pyproject.toml, behave, coverage), Rust crate (Cargo.toml, lib.rs, CLI bin, cucumber integration tests), shared step definitions in features/steps/, tools/check_spec_parity.py, Makefile, and CI workflow. All make coverage-python, make coverage-rust, and make check-parity must pass at 100%.
payload.title: Phase 0 scaffolding implementation
